FADE IN:

INT. LAGOS OFFICE TOWER - DAY

AMARA (35, sharp) stands at the window overlooking the bustling streets of Lagos, Nigeria. The Victoria Island skyline stretches before her.

                    AMARA
          This city never stops moving.

INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - LAGOS - DAY

Amara meets with investors. The Lagos skyline visible through floor-to-ceiling windows.

EXT. LAGOS STREETS - DAY

Amara navigates through the vibrant chaos of Lagos traffic. Street vendors, danfos, and modern cars blend together.

INT. AIRPORT LOUNGE - LAGOS - EVENING

Amara waits for her flight, laptop open. The announcement board shows: LAGOS TO JOHANNESBURG.

EXT. OR TAMBO AIRPORT - JOHANNESBURG - DAY

Amara arrives in Johannesburg, South Africa. The Gauteng skyline visible in the distance.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - SANDTON, JOHANNESBURG - NIGHT

Amara unpacks in a luxury hotel in Sandton. The lights of Joburg twinkle outside.

EXT. JOHANNESBURG BUSINESS DISTRICT - DAY

Amara walks through the modern business district of Johannesburg. Nelson Mandela Square bustles with activity.

INT. OFFICE - JOHANNESBURG - DAY

Amara meets THABO (40s, confident), a South African film producer.

                    THABO
          Welcome to Joburg. This city has 
          the infrastructure you need.

EXT. CAPE TOWN - DAY

MONTAGE: Scenic shots of Cape Town, South Africa - Table Mountain, the Waterfront, colorful Bo-Kaap houses.

INT. CAPE TOWN STUDIO - DAY

Amara tours a state-of-the-art production facility in Cape Town.

EXT. LONDON HEATHROW - DAY

Amara arrives in London, United Kingdom. The iconic airport terminal.

INT. TAXI - LONDON - DAY

Amara rides through London streets, past Big Ben and the Thames.

INT. PRODUCTION OFFICE - SOHO, LONDON - DAY

Amara meets with JAMES (50s, experienced), a UK film executive.

                    JAMES
          London offers world-class facilities 
          and the UK tax credit is quite 
          competitive.

EXT. LONDON STREETS - EVENING

Amara walks through Covent Garden. The energy of London surrounds her.

INT. PUB - LONDON - NIGHT

Amara has dinner in a traditional English pub in Shoreditch.

EXT. MALTA AIRPORT - DAY

Amara arrives in Valletta, Malta. The Mediterranean sun is brilliant.

INT. HOTEL - VALLETTA, MALTA - DAY

Amara checks into her hotel overlooking Valletta's historic harbor.

EXT. MALTA FILM STUDIOS - DAY

Amara tours the massive water tanks and soundstages of Malta's film facilities.

                    AMARA (V.O.)
          Malta... who knew such a small 
          island could offer so much.

INT. RESTAURANT - VALLETTA, MALTA - NIGHT

Amara dines with MARCO (45, charismatic), a Maltese line producer.

                    MARCO
          We've hosted Hollywood blockbusters. 
          The Malta cash rebate is very attractive.

EXT. BLUE LAGOON - MALTA - DAY

Amara scouts the stunning Blue Lagoon. Crystal clear Mediterranean waters.

INT. CAFE - VALLETTA - DAY

Amara reviews her notes on laptop. A comparison table shows:
- Nigeria: Emerging market
- South Africa: Skilled crews, lower costs
- UK: Premium quality, 25% tax relief
- Malta: 40% cash rebate, weather

EXT. MALTA STREETS - SUNSET

Amara walks through the ancient streets of Valletta as the sun sets.

INT. VIDEO CALL - MALTA HOTEL - NIGHT

Amara video calls her team back in Lagos.

                    AMARA
          I've found what we need. Each 
          location has its strengths.

EXT. RETURN TO LAGOS - DAY

Amara arrives back in Lagos, Nigeria. Home, but changed.

INT. LAGOS OFFICE - DAY

Amara presents her findings to her team. Maps of Nigeria, South Africa, UK, and Malta on the wall.

                    AMARA
          We shoot the Lagos scenes in Lagos,
          Joburg doubles for other African cities,
          London for the European sequences,
          and Malta for our coastal scenes.

The team nods in agreement.

EXT. LAGOS SKYLINE - SUNSET

The camera pulls back over Lagos as Amara looks out over the city, ready to begin.

FADE OUT.
